text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
T.M. Opera O's debut, her first opportunity to
put her running on display, has arrived.

It's finally debut time... I hope everything will be
okay...

It should so long as it goes well at the start...
But... But, still... Ohhh...
choice_data_list: Opera O? Trying on a new look?

text_block_list.text: Hyeeek! I'm so sorry... But I'm not Opera O.

My name's Meisho Doto... I'm... one of her
friends...

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text:
She might not see me as a friend, but I still
came... to, well, to cheer her on...
choice_data_list: Do you know where she is?

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text:
Umm, well... I don't think she's here yet. That's
why I'm worried.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: It seems she's late on her first day... Really late.

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
Greetings, Trainer. Waiting for me? I am positive
you were.

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
I have purposefully made you wait, you see.
Haaah ha ha!

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text: How could there be? I planned this late arrival.

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
As the star, how rude would it be to rob the
supporting cast of their due attention by taking
the stage first?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: She knows she's done something wrong...

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
Ahh, my debut race! The day has finally come to
reveal my beauty and stride to the masses!

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text: But a debut is not all that I shall be making!

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text: A legend... A following... And love!

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text: Love... You're amazing, Opera O...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Some people are swayed by confidence alone.

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
Let us depart, Trainer! The era is waiting for its
new shining star.

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
Do not fret about the outcome. Begin
preparations for the post-race press conference
straight away.

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
There must be enough seating to accommodate
all the flocking media reporters! Haaah ha ha ha!
